# CGPDFOperatorTableCreate()

**Function**

Creates an empty PDF operator table.

## Declaration

```swift
func CGPDFOperatorTableCreate() -> CGPDFOperatorTableRef?
```

## Return Value

An empty PDF operator table. In Objective-C, you’re responsible for releasing this object by calling [doc://com.apple.coregraphics/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGPDFOperatorTableRelease(_:)].

## Discussion

Call the function [doc://com.apple.coregraphics/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGPDFOperatorTableSetCallback(_:_:_:)] to fill the operator table with callbacks.
